description: Rewrite 6 fake QuantAds components from object-tree format to real React JSX with Tailwind CSS: AnalyticsChart, AudienceBuilder, BudgetOptimizer, CampaignCard, CreativePreview, PlacementSelector.
steps: Read apps/quantads/src/types/index.ts to understand Campaign, Creative, Placement, and other types
Rewrite apps/quantads/src/components/AnalyticsChart.tsx: Convert to JSX chart/metrics display component.
Rewrite apps/quantads/src/components/AudienceBuilder.tsx: Convert to JSX audience targeting builder UI.
Rewrite apps/quantads/src/components/BudgetOptimizer.tsx: Convert to JSX budget management/optimization UI.
Rewrite apps/quantads/src/components/CampaignCard.tsx: Convert to JSX campaign card with status badge, metrics (impressions, clicks, CTR, spend), budget bar, and objective tag. Keep formatNum helper.
Rewrite apps/quantads/src/components/CreativePreview.tsx: Convert to JSX creative preview/display component.
Rewrite apps/quantads/src/components/PlacementSelector.tsx: Convert to JSX ad placement selection UI.
Verify: Run `pnpm typecheck --filter=@quant/quantads` passes with 0 errors.
acceptance_criteria: All 6 QuantAds files return JSX (not object trees)
grep -n "type: 'div'" across all 6 files returns 0 matches
All files maintain their original Props interfaces
All files use Tailwind CSS classes
Export structure preserved (named export + default export)
